title: rumex salicifolius var. subarcticus
intro: Rumex salicifolius var. subarcticus, also known as the subarctic dock, is a plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The subarctic dock has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and sore throats, and may help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves and stems being used for medicinal purposes.
